# cmccloudv2_opensearch_flavor (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# get opensearch flavor by name 
data "cmccloudv2_opensearch_flavor" "flavor_1" {
    name = "os.small.1"  
}

# get opensearch flavor by id
data "cmccloudv2_opensearch_flavor" "flavor_2" {
    flavor_id = "88705daf-1119-419d-874c-0c894704d37c" 
}

# get opensearch flavor by CPU & RAM 
data "cmccloudv2_opensearch_flavor" "flavor_3" {
    cpu = 2
    ram = 4
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cpu` (Number) Filter by number of vcpus of flavor
- `flavor_id` (String) Id of the flavor
- `name` (String) Filter by name of flavor (case-insenitive), match exactly
- `ram` (Number) Filter by ram size (GB) of flavor

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
